ePrescriptions

Claim Dispatch

eClaims and Preauth APIs
eClaims and Preauth APIs

Preauths

Endpointhttps://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1

Endpoints for preauthorization processes.

Fetches a preauthorization

GET
https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1
/preauths

Fetches an existing preauthorization linked to the consent token provided

Fetches a preauthorization › query Parameters

consent_token
string · required

consent token linked to the preauth

Example: K5HLPJVDNV

Fetches a preauthorization › Responses

Preauthorization retrieved successfully

GET/preauths
curl --request GET \
  --url 'https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1/preauths?consent_token=%3Cstring%3E'
shell

json
application/json

Create a preauthorization

POST
https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1
/preauths

Creates a new preauthorization using multipart form data with file uploads

Create a preauthorization › Request Body

oneOf
Exactly one variant must match.

Decision Table

VariantMatching Criteria
type = object · requires: consent_token, intervention_code, service_start +6 more
type = object · requires: consent_token, intervention_code, service_start +13 more
type = object · requires: consent_token, intervention_code, service_start +10 more
type = object · requires: consent_token, intervention_code, service_start +11 more
type = object · requires: consent_token, intervention_code, service_start +12 more
type = object · requires: consent_token, intervention_code, service_start +7 more
Properties for Normal Preauth:
Normal preauthorization request. Contains only the base fields for any normal preauthorisations.
consent_token
string · required

Consent token for authorization. This is the authorization_code received from the Create Virtual Claim endpoint.

Example: J6LAFNBPZN
intervention_code
string · required

Intervention code for the service offered

Example: SHA-11-001
service_start
string · required

ISO timestamp for when the service started

Example: 2025-08-18T15:30:00+03:00
service_end
string · required

ISO timestamp for when the service ended

Example: 2025-08-19T15:30:00+03:00
object[] · required

List of billed items

Example: [{"unit_price":"1500.00"}]
object[] · required

List of diagnoses

Example: [{"consent_token":"J6LAFNBPZN","icd_code":"ca07.0"}]
object[] · required

List of doctors

Example: [{"identification_number":"A00000","identification_type":"registration_number","regulation_body":"KMPDC","intervention_code":"SHA-11-001","is_primary":true}]
object[] · required

List of attachments

Example: [{"document_title":"Lab Results","document_type":"LAB_TESTS","file_field_name":"attachments_0_file_blob"}]
provider_notification_email
string · email · required

Email to notify the provider of any updates on the preauthorization request

Example: clifford.ouma@savannahinformatics.com

Create a preauthorization › Responses

Preauthorization created successfully

POST/preauths
curl --request POST \
  --url https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1/preauths \
  --header 'Content-Type: multipart/form-data' \
  --form consent_token=J6LAFNBPZN \
  --form intervention_code=SHA-11-001 \
  --form 'service_start=2025-08-18T15:30:00+03:00' \
  --form 'service_end=2025-08-19T15:30:00+03:00' \
  --form 'items={"unit_price":"1500.00"}' \
  --form 'diagnoses={"consent_token":"J6LAFNBPZN","icd_code":"ca07.0"}' \
  --form 'doctors={"identification_number":"A00000","identification_type":"registration_number","regulation_body":"KMPDC","intervention_code":"SHA-11-001","is_primary":true}' \
  --form 'attachments={"document_title":"Lab Results","document_type":"BIOPSY_RESULT","file_field_name":"attachments_0_file_blob"}' \
  --form provider_notification_email=test@example.com
shell
Example Request Body
{
  "consent_token": "J6LAFNBPZN",
  "intervention_code": "SHA-11-001",
  "service_start": "2025-08-18T15:30:00+03:00",
  "service_end": "2025-08-19T15:30:00+03:00",
  "items": [
    {
      "unit_price": "1500.00"
    }
  ],
  "diagnoses": [
    {
      "consent_token": "J6LAFNBPZN",
      "icd_code": "ca07.0"
    }
  ],
  "doctors": [
    {
      "identification_number": "A00000",
      "identification_type": "registration_number",
      "regulation_body": "KMPDC",
      "intervention_code": "SHA-11-001",
      "is_primary": true
    }
  ],
  "attachments": [
    {
      "document_title": "Lab Results",
      "document_type": "BIOPSY_RESULT",
      "file_field_name": "attachments_0_file_blob"
    }
  ],
  "provider_notification_email": "test@example.com"
}

json
application/json

Cancel a preauthorization

POST
https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1
/preauths/cancel

Cancels an existing preauthorization identified by its consent token and intervention code. Cancellation is only valid while the preauth is in one of these statuses: DRAFT, FINALISED, PENDING_DOCTOR_APPROVAL, or the pending-clarification state.

Cancel a preauthorization › Headers

X-Facility-Id
string

Facility Registry (FR) code identifying the facility. Required when authenticating with a service-account token.

Example: FID-47-115307-8
X-Facility-Id-Type
string

Type of identifier supplied in X-Facility-Id. Currently only fr-code is supported.

Example: fr-code

Cancel a preauthorization › Request Body

Request payload for canceling a preauthorization. Requires consent token and intervention code.
consent_token
string · required

Beneficiary consent token authorizing the preauthorization to be cancelled.

Example: K5HLPJVDNV
intervention_code
string · required

SHA intervention (benefit package) code of the preauthorization being cancelled.

Example: SHA-18-005

Cancel a preauthorization › Responses

Preauthorization canceled successfully

POST/preauths/cancel
curl --request POST \
  --url https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1/preauths/cancel \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data '
{
  "consent_token": "K5HLPJVDNV",
  "intervention_code": "SHA-18-005"
}
'
shell
Example Request Body
{
  "consent_token": "K5HLPJVDNV",
  "intervention_code": "SHA-18-005"
}

json
application/json

Remove a diagnosis from a preauthorization

DELETE
https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1
/preauths/diagnoses/{icd_code}

Removes a diagnosis from an existing preauthorization. The ICD diagnosis code to remove (e.g. A09) is supplied in the path; the request body carries the consent token and related identifiers.

Remove a diagnosis from a preauthorization › path Parameters

icd_code
string · required

ICD diagnosis code to remove

Example: A09

Remove a diagnosis from a preauthorization › Headers

X-Facility-Id
string

Facility Registry (FR) code identifying the facility. Required when authenticating with a service-account token.

Example: FID-47-115307-8
X-Facility-Id-Type
string

Type of identifier supplied in X-Facility-Id. Currently only fr-code is supported.

Example: fr-code

Remove a diagnosis from a preauthorization › Request Body

consent_token
string · required

Consent token authorising the action on the beneficiary's preauthorisation.

Example: K5HLPJVDNV
icd_code
string · required

ICD-10 diagnosis code to remove from the preauthorisation.

Example: A09
intervention_code
string · required

SHA intervention code the diagnosis is associated with.

Example: SHA-18-005

Remove a diagnosis from a preauthorization › Responses

Preauth diagnosis removed successfully

string
DELETE/preauths/diagnoses/{icd_code}
curl --request DELETE \
  --url https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1/preauths/diagnoses/:icd_code \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data '
{
  "consent_token": "K5HLPJVDNV",
  "icd_code": "A09",
  "intervention_code": "SHA-18-005"
}
'
shell
Example Request Body
{
  "consent_token": "K5HLPJVDNV",
  "icd_code": "A09",
  "intervention_code": "SHA-18-005"
}
json
Example Responses
{}
json
application/json

Remove a doctor from a preauthorization

DELETE
https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1
/preauths/doctors

Removes a doctor (practitioner) from an existing preauthorization. The practitioner is identified by their PractitionerRegistrationNumber supplied in the request body.

Remove a doctor from a preauthorization › Headers

X-Facility-Id
string

Facility Registry (FR) code identifying the facility. Required when authenticating with a service-account token.

Example: FID-47-115307-8
X-Facility-Id-Type
string

Type of identifier supplied in X-Facility-Id. Currently only fr-code is supported.

Example: fr-code

Remove a doctor from a preauthorization › Request Body

consent_token
string · required

Consent token authorising the action on the beneficiary's preauthorisation.

Example: K5HLPJVDNV
intervention_code
string · required

SHA intervention code the doctor is associated with.

Example: SHA-18-005
practitioner_registration_number
string · required

Regulatory registration number of the practitioner to remove. Example is dummy data.

Example: A00000

Remove a doctor from a preauthorization › Responses

Preauth doctor removed successfully

string
DELETE/preauths/doctors
curl --request DELETE \
  --url https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1/preauths/doctors \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data '
{
  "consent_token": "K5HLPJVDNV",
  "intervention_code": "SHA-18-005",
  "practitioner_registration_number": "A00000"
}
'
shell
Example Request Body
{
  "consent_token": "K5HLPJVDNV",
  "intervention_code": "SHA-18-005",
  "practitioner_registration_number": "A00000"
}
json
Example Responses
{}
json
application/json
InterventionsBilling
